name: design-system-clay
title: Clay
description: Creative agency. Organic shapes, soft gradients, art-directed layout.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 创意代理风格。有机形状、柔和渐变、艺术化布局。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 創意代理風格。有機形狀、柔和漸層、藝術化版面。
description_i18n.ja: クリエイティブエージェンシー風。オーガニックな形状、柔らかなグラデーション、アートディレクションレイアウト。
description_i18n.ko: 크리에이티브 에이전시 스타일. 유기적 형태, 부드러운 그라데이션, 아트 디렉팅 레이아웃.
description_i18n.de: Kreativagentur. Organische Formen, weiche Verläufe, art-directed Layout.
description_i18n.fr: Agence créative. Formes organiques, dégradés doux, mise en page art-dirigée.
description_i18n.ru: Креативное агентство. Органические формы, мягкие градиенты, арт-дирекшн макет.
description_i18n.es: Agencia creativa. Formas orgánicas, degradados suaves, diseño art-directed.
description_i18n.pt-BR: Agência criativa. Formas orgânicas, gradientes suaves, layout com direção de arte.
description_i18n.it: Agenzia creativa. Forme organiche, gradienti morbidi, layout art-directed.
description_i18n.vi: Phong cách agency sáng tạo. Hình dạng hữu cơ, gradient mềm mại, bố cục art-directed.
description_i18n.pl: Agencja kreatywna. Organiczne kształty, miękkie gradienty, art-directed layout.
description_i18n.id: Agensi kreatif. Bentuk organik, gradien lembut, tata letak art-directed.
description_i18n.nl: Creatief bureau. Organische vormen, zachte verloopkleuren, art-directed layout.
description_i18n.ar: وكالة إبداعية. أشكال عضوية، تدرجات ناعمة، تخطيط موجه فنياً.
description_i18n.tr: Yaratıcı ajans. Organik şekiller, yumuşak gradyanlar, sanatsal yönetmenlikli düzen.
description_i18n.uk: Креативне агентство. Органічні форми, м'які градієнти, арт-дирекшн макет.
description_i18n.en: Creative agency. Organic shapes, soft gradients, art-directed layout.

query.en: Generate a {{artifactKind}} using the Clay design system. Stay faithful to its colour palette, typography, spacing, iconography, and component vocabulary as documented in DESIGN.md.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：Generate a {{artifactKind}} using the Clay design system. Stay faithful to its colour palette, typography, spacing, iconography, and component vocabulary as documented in DESIGN.md.
